inner.appendChild(image); inner.appendChild(counter); inner.appendChild(date); frame.appendChild(inner); return frame; } const preloadImage = (src) => { const img = new Image(); img.src = src; }; function preloadFooterImages() { preloadImage(FALLBACK_CENTER_IMAGE_URL); preloadImage(CENTER_IMAGE_URL); } function handleFooter() { const oldCandidatePic = document.getElementById('candidate_pic'); const oldRunningMatePic = document.getElementById('running_mate_pic'); const gameWindow = document.getElementById('game_window'); if (!oldCandidatePic || !oldRunningMatePic || !gameWindow) { return; } const candidatePicSrc = oldCandidatePic.src; const runningMatePicSrc = oldRunningMatePic.src; oldCandidatePic.remove(); oldRunningMatePic.remove(); const qNum = campaignTrail_temp.question_number || 0; const totalQuestions = 20; const counterText = `${qNum + 1}/${totalQuestions}`; const dateText = questionDateMap[qNum] || "Fall 2000"; let newFooter = document.getElementById('new_footer'); if (!newFooter) { newFooter = document.createElement("div"); newFooter.id = "new_footer"; gameWindow.appendChild(newFooter); } const fragment = document.createDocumentFragment(); const candidateBox = createPolaroidBox({ imageSrc: candidatePicSrc, side: "left" }); const centerBox = createCenterFrame({ imageSrc: CENTER_IMAGE_URL || FALLBACK_CENTER_IMAGE_URL, counterText, dateText }); const runningMateBox = createPolaroidBox({ imageSrc: runningMatePicSrc, side: "right" }); fragment.appendChild(candidateBox); fragment.appendChild(centerBox); fragment.appendChild(runningMateBox); newFooter.replaceChildren(candidateBox, centerBox, runningMateBox); const signDisplay = document.querySelector('.inner_window_sign_display'); if (signDisplay) signDisplay.style.display = "none"; } if (!window._footerObserver) { preloadFooterImages(); const target = document.getElementById('game_window') || document.body; const observerOpts = { childList: true, subtree: true }; window._footerObserver = new MutationObserver((mutations) => { for (const mutation of mutations) { for (const node of mutation.addedNodes) { if (node.nodeType !== Node.ELEMENT_NODE) continue; if ( node.id === 'candidate_pic' || (node.querySelector?.('#candidate_pic')) ) { window._footerObserver.disconnect(); handleFooter(); window._footerObserver.observe(target, observerOpts); return; } } } }); window._footerObserver.observe(target, observerOpts); if (document.getElementById('candidate_pic')) { handleFooter(); } } // This loads the achievements for the mod. const ACH_CONFIG = { STORAGE_KEY: "unlockedAch", POPUP_DURATION_MS: 5000, SOUND_URL: "" }; const achState = { permanent: JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem(ACH_CONFIG.STORAGE_KEY)) || {}, session: new Set(), queue: [], isShowing: false }; function unlockAchievement(title) { const game = window.campaignTrail_temp; if (!game?.CTS) return; if (achState.session.has(title)) return; const achData = game.achievements?.[title]; if (!achData) { return console.error(`Achievement "${title}" not found. Check for typos?`); } // check global cheats variable if (achData.cannotBeCheated && window.cheatsActive) { return console.log(`Cannot unlock "${title}" - cheats are active.`); } // mark as unlocked for this specific run achState.session.add(title); // handle permanent saving const shouldSavePermanently = game.difficulty_level_multiplier <= 1 && !achState.permanent[title]; if (shouldSavePermanently) { achState.permanent[title] = true; localStorage.setItem(ACH_CONFIG.STORAGE_KEY, JSON.stringify(achState.permanent)); if (typeof window.unlockedAch !== 'undefined') { window.unlockedAch[title] = achData; } window.modCompletionCache = null; window.lastCacheUpdate = 0; if (typeof window.addAllAchievements === 'function') { window.addAllAchievements(); } } // user options for achievements const popupSetting = game.achPopup || 'always'; const isNewUnlock = shouldSavePermanently; if (popupSetting === 'newonly' && !isNewUnlock) { return; } // add to queue and process achState.queue.push({ title, ...achData }); processAchievementQueue(); } function processAchievementQueue() { if (achState.isShowing || achState.queue.length === 0) return; achState.isShowing = true; const achData = achState.queue.shift(); if (ACH_CONFIG.SOUND_URL) { new Audio(ACH_CONFIG.SOUND_URL).play().catch(e => console.warn("Audio play blocked:", e)); } const overlay = createAchievementDOM(achData); document.body.appendChild(overlay); requestAnimationFrame(() => overlay.classList.add('show')); setTimeout(() => closeOverlay(overlay), ACH_CONFIG.POPUP_DURATION_MS); } function createAchievementDOM({ title, image, description }) { const overlay = document.createElement('div'); overlay.className = 'achievement-popup'; overlay.innerHTML = `

${title}

${description || ''}

`; return overlay; } function closeOverlay(overlay) { overlay.classList.remove('show'); overlay.addEventListener('transitionend', () => { overlay.remove(); achState.isShowing = false; processAchievementQueue(); }, { once: true }); } // CYOA variables & tracking e.cyoa = true; e.noCounter = 0; let ruthlessness = 0; let linus_bond = 0; let cynicism = 0; let anti_establishment = 0; let patty_approval = 0; let support_burnouts = 1; let support_honors = 1; let support_jocks = 1; let support_arts = 1; let support_admin = 2; // pk -> index lookup for questions let _questionIdxByPk = null; function _rebuildQuestionIdxMap() { _questionIdxByPk = new Map(); const arr = campaignTrail_temp.questions_json; for (let i = 0; i < arr.length; i++) { _questionIdxByPk.set(Number(arr[i].pk), i); } } // returns the true array index (>= 0) or -1 if not found function getQuestionIndexFromPk(pk) { const n = Number(pk); if (!_questionIdxByPk) _rebuildQuestionIdxMap(); let idx = _questionIdxByPk.get(n); // if map is stale, rebuild once if (idx == null || campaignTrail_temp.questions_json[idx]?.pk !== n) { _rebuildQuestionIdxMap(); idx = _questionIdxByPk.get(n); } return idx ?? -1; } // index to assign into question_number before nextQuestion() function getJumpIndexFromPk(pk) { const idx = getQuestionIndexFromPk(pk); return idx >= 0 ? idx - 1 : -1; } // for backwards compatibility function getQuestionNumberFromPk(pk) { return getJumpIndexFromPk(pk); } function questionSwapper(pk1, pk2) { const questionData = campaignTrail_temp.questions_json; // find indices of the questions const index1 = getQuestionIndexFromPk(pk1); const index2 = getQuestionIndexFromPk(pk2); // validate both questions exist if (index1 === -1 || index2 === -1) { console.warn(`questionSwapper: Could not find question(s) with pk ${pk1} and/or ${pk2}`); return false; } // swap the entire question objects [questionData[index1], questionData[index2]] = [questionData[index2], questionData[index1]]; // rebuild the index map since positions changed _rebuildQuestionIdxMap(); return true; } function answerSwapper(pk1, pk2, takeEffects = true) { const answerData = campaignTrail_temp.answers_json; // find the indices of the objects with the specified PKs const index1 = answerData.findIndex(item => Number(item.pk) === Number(pk1)); const index2 = answerData.findIndex(item => Number(item.pk) === Number(pk2)); // check if objects with those PKs exist if (index1 === -1 || index2 === -1) return; // swap the question assignment const tempQuestion = answerData[index1].fields.question; answerData[index1].fields.question = answerData[index2].fields.question; answerData[index2].fields.question = tempQuestion; // if takeEffects is true, answers swap effects also if (takeEffects) { const otherJsons = [ campaignTrail_temp.answer_score_global_json, campaignTrail_temp.answer_score_issue_json, campaignTrail_temp.answer_score_state_json, campaignTrail_temp.answer_feedback_json ]; otherJsons.forEach(jsonData => { if (!jsonData) return; jsonData.forEach(item => { const itemAns = Number(item.fields.answer); if (itemAns === Number(pk1)) { item.fields.answer = pk2; } else if (itemAns === Number(pk2)) { item.fields.answer = pk1; } }); }); } } // Feedback updater, taken and modified from 2021DE function updateFeedback(pkValue, newFeedback) { const numPk = Number(pkValue); const feedbackJson = campaignTrail_temp.answer_feedback_json; if (!feedbackJson) return; for (let i = 0, len = feedbackJson.length; i < len; i++) { const fields = feedbackJson[i].fields; if ( Number(feedbackJson[i].pk) === numPk || Number(fields.answer) === numPk ) { fields.answer_feedback = newFeedback; return; } } } // CYOA down here! cyoAdventure = function (a) { if (!campaignTrail_temp.player_answers || campaignTrail_temp.player_answers.length === 0) return; const ans = campaignTrail_temp.player_answers[campaignTrail_temp.player_answers.length - 1]; e.noCounter = campaignTrail_temp.player_answers.length; // psychological/internal traits if ([3310, 3316, 3323, 3324, 3342, 3359, 3366, 3386, 3411, 3430, 12401, 12379, 12390, 12431, 12448, 12465].includes(ans)) ruthlessness += 1; if ([3326, 3333, 3339, 3431].includes(ans)) ruthlessness += 2; if ([3315, 3322, 3328, 3338, 3343, 3376, 3383, 3387, 3398, 3502, 12395, 12407].includes(ans)) ruthlessness -= 1; if ([3334, 3429].includes(ans)) ruthlessness -= 2; if ([3328, 3334, 3361, 12395, 12407].includes(ans)) linus_bond += 1; if ([3338, 3360].includes(ans)) linus_bond += 2; if ([3310, 3327, 3335, 3337, 3359, 3386, 12379, 12390, 12401, 12448].includes(ans)) linus_bond -= 1; if ([3326, 3333, 3339, 3342].includes(ans)) linus_bond -= 2; if ([3312, 3316, 3320, 3323, 3361, 3366, 3375, 3376, 3381, 3430, 3488, 12415, 12440].includes(ans)) cynicism += 1; if ([3341, 3487, 12466].includes(ans)) cynicism += 2; if ([3315, 3319, 3322, 3343, 3360, 3367, 3374, 3387, 3489, 3502, 12465, 12467].includes(ans)) cynicism -= 1; if ([3310, 3311, 3314, 3319, 3327, 3330, 3331, 3337, 3344, 3367, 3368, 3383, 3382, 3385, 3398, 3409, 3489, 12423, 12431, 12465].includes(ans)) anti_establishment += 1; if ([3346, 3397, 3501].includes(ans)) anti_establishment += 2; if ([3318, 3332, 3381, 3410, 12240, 12415].includes(ans)) anti_establishment -= 1; if ([3345, 3399].includes(ans)) anti_establishment -= 2; if ([3310, 3311, 3314, 3318, 3324, 3326, 3331, 3333, 3339, 3342, 3345, 3368, 3382, 3385, 3386, 3397, 3410, 3411, 3430, 3501, 12401, 12423, 12448, 12467].includes(ans)) patty_approval += 1; if ([3431].includes(ans)) patty_approval += 2; if ([3312, 3316, 3320, 3323, 3334, 3338, 3344, 3381, 3399, 3409, 3487, 12240, 12407, 12415, 12440].includes(ans)) patty_approval -= 1; if ([3429].includes(ans)) patty_approval -= 2; // faction/clique support if ([3311, 3314, 3319, 3327, 3330, 3331, 3368, 3381, 3397, 3501, 12431, 12466].includes(ans)) support_burnouts += 1; if ([3318, 3345, 3399, 12240, 12415].includes(ans)) support_burnouts -= 1; if ([3315, 3320, 3332, 3345, 3382, 3383, 3398, 12240, 12415].includes(ans)) support_honors += 1; if ([3344, 3346, 3397, 3431, 12431, 12466].includes(ans)) support_honors -= 1; if ([3318, 3331, 3345, 3399, 3430, 3431].includes(ans)) support_jocks += 1; if ([3319, 3327, 3344, 3429, 3501].includes(ans)) support_jocks -= 1; if ([3330, 3343, 3367, 3368, 3383, 3410, 12407, 12395].includes(ans)) support_arts += 1; if ([3411].includes(ans)) support_arts += 2; if ([3326, 3342, 3399, 3409, 12401].includes(ans)) support_arts -= 1; if ([3324, 3332, 3399, 12240, 12415].includes(ans)) support_admin += 1; if ([3311, 3330, 3331, 3346, 3367, 3381, 3382, 3397, 3398, 3410, 3501, 12423, 12431, 12465].includes(ans)) support_admin -= 1; // it's royin' time if ((ans === 12440 || ans === 3429) && !window.isRoyInCharge) { window.isRoyInCharge = true; campaignTrail_temp.running_mate_image_url = "https://file.garden/aNtAfG887DiA_7lO/TML_2000/roy.jpg"; campaignTrail_temp.election_json[0]["fields"].advisor_url = "https://file.garden/aNtAfG887DiA_7lO/TML_2000/roy_advisor2.png"; CENTER_IMAGE_URL = "https://i.pinimg.com/1200x/4b/38/7d/4b387d964d5502f237e4951befc19adb.jpg"; // as Patty stepped down questionSwapper(375, 430); } // other stuff // psst: noCounter value should be question no. - 1 if (e.noCounter === 7) { if (patty_approval <= 0) { questionSwapper(348, 420); } } if (e.noCounter === 14) { if (anti_establishment >= 4) { questionSwapper(362, 410); } } // spooky variable changes // Lucy's offer if (e.noCounter === 4) { const q349 = campaignTrail_temp.questions_json.find(q => q.pk === 349); if (q349) { if (ruthlessness >= 2) { q349.fields.description = "Halfway through a plate of fries at a diner after school, you get confused when the Lucy Van Pelt, for some reason, in spooktacular fashion, slides into the booth across from you without asking. Unsurprisingly, Lucy runs the school’s entire social hierarchy with an iron fist and operates a sprawling gossip network out of the second-floor girls’ bathroom that can make or break a reputation.

“I’ve been watching you, blockhead,” she smirks, stirring her coffee. “You’ve got a bit more bite this semester. I like it, I really do. My brother thinks he’s a philosopher king destined to rule over us morons, but I have some dirt on him that would end his pathetic campaign. I know you have the guts to use it now. You want it?”"; } else if (cynicism >= 2) { q349.fields.description = "Halfway through a plate of fries at a diner after school, you get confused when the Lucy Van Pelt, for some reason, in spooktacular fashion, slides into the booth across from you without asking. Unsurprisingly, Lucy runs the school’s entire social hierarchy with an iron fist and operates a sprawling gossip network out of the second-floor girls’ bathroom that can make or break a reputation.

“You look like shit, Charlie,” she says flatly, staring into her black coffee. “And my brother isn’t looking much better. People are shitting on him from such a height, that I think God himself has crapped on him. Good news is, I have dirt on him that would end his pathetic little campaign right now. Just… take it. End this before you two kill each other. How’s that?”"; updateFeedback(3334, "You tell her you aren’t going to win like this. You expect her to sneer, or yell, or call you a blockhead. But she doesn’t. Lucy watches you for a long, quiet moment, the hard lines of her face softening into something that looks uncomfortably like pity.

“You know, Charlie Brown,” she says softly, stopping her spoon. “I offered you this because I thought you wanted to survive. But you two are just going to bleed each other dry, aren’t you?” She slides the folder back into her bag without another word. Patty is furious when she finds out, but as you walk home, you can’t stop thinking about the look in Lucy’s eyes."); } else { q349.fields.description = "Halfway through a plate of fries at a diner after school, you get confused when the Lucy Van Pelt, for some reason, in spooktacular fashion, slides into the booth across from you without asking. Unsurprisingly, Lucy runs the school’s entire social hierarchy with an iron fist and operates a sprawling gossip network out of the second-floor girls’ bathroom that can make or break a reputation.

“You’re too soft, Charlie Brown,” she sighs, stirring her coffee with visible disappointment. “But my brother is an arrogant prick who thinks he’s Mr. Big, or something. I have dirt on him that would end his pathetic little campaign. The question is: do you actually have the spine to use it, blockhead?”"; } // extra if (cynicism >= 2 && ruthlessness < 2) { updateFeedback(3333, "Lucy slides a manila folder across the table with one finger, and inside you find undeniable proof that Linus paid a desperate freshman fifty dollars to ghostwrite his AP English thesis, one that won him an award for Academic Excellence and cemented his reputation as the so-called intellectual conscience of the seniors.

Patty leaks it anonymously to the school paper, and the resulting carnage sends Linus’s numbers into freefall. And yet, watching him hold a tearful, unconvincing press conference in the auditorium doesn't make you feel like a winner. It just makes you feel sick to your stomach."); } } } // hit the road Sally if (e.noCounter === 6) { const q346 = campaignTrail_temp.questions_json.find(q => q.pk === 346); if (q346) { if (anti_establishment >= 2 && ruthlessness >= 1) { q346.fields.description = "Sally, your freshman sister, catches you at your locker between classes, grabbing your sleeve and pulling you into the space between the school’s trophy case and the wall. It’s not good; her eyes are red-rimmed and glassy. “My friends are terrified of you,” she hisses, her voice cracking. “They say you're going on a revenge trip, t-that you're going to cancel all the events and punish anyone who ever looked at you funny. I’m going to have to spend the rest of high school being the sister of the… crazy kid who burned it all down! Why do you always have to ruin everything for me?”"; updateFeedback(3322, "You hate this. You really do. As you look at your little sister and see the sheer terror your radical campaign has instilled in her, you feel entirely unwanted. You apologize, but her eyes stay wide and fearful. You don’t even notice an AV club sophomore lingering a few feet away with his camcorder running, capturing the whole exchange for the weekly student broadcast, but to you, it doesn’t matter. You feel like a villain."); } else if (patty_approval >= 2 && cynicism <= 1) { q346.fields.description = "Sally, your freshman sister, catches you at your locker between classes, grabbing your sleeve and pulling you into the space between the school’s trophy case and the wall. It’s not good; her eyes are red-rimmed and glassy. “My friends are making fun of me because my brother is acting like a total sellout,” she hisses, her voice cracking. “My friends keep saying this is how it starts,” she hisses, her voice cracking. “First you smile for pictures and promise everybody everything, then later you’re stealing money and lying and ruining everyone around you… and I’m gonna be stuck as your sister when it happens. Why can’t you just be normal for once?”"; } } } // approaching the debate if (e.noCounter === 9) { const q347 = campaignTrail_temp.questions_json.find(q => q.pk === 347); if (q347) { if (linus_bond <= -2) { q347.fields.description = "You and Linus agreed to a debate in the gym. It’s the only debate, too, since Linus’s camp refused to agree to any others after their internal polling showed he had more to lose than gain from sharing a stage with you. He’s standing at his podium in a goddamn sweater vest, talking about “leaving childish things behind” and “stepping into the future of our school,” yet you spend no time listening to his nonsense. He does not deserve your attention. After a round of applause, the moderator turns to you. You have the floor."; } else if (linus_bond >= 2) { q347.fields.description = "You and Linus agreed to a debate in the gym. He’s standing at his podium in a goddamn sweater vest, talking about “leaving childish things behind” and “stepping into the future of our school,” among other stuff. He actually gives you a polite, somewhat melancholic nod before he begins. It makes it a lot harder to be angry at him. In fact, you don’t even think his sweater is that bad in the first place. Damn. After a round of applause, the moderator turns to you. You have the floor."; } } if (window.isRoyInCharge) { // ooooh flimsy Roy, where did you go, what have you seen updateFeedback(3326, "Roy lets out a low, impressed whistle from the front row. Oh, he thought this debate was going to be completely lame, but watching you metaphorically execute Linus on stage has fully captured his attention. Linus is no golden boy, and thanks to you, everyone knows it."); } } // approaching the locker break-in if (e.noCounter === 10) { const q351 = campaignTrail_temp.questions_json.find(q => q.pk === 351); if (q351) { if (patty_approval >= 3 && !window.isRoyInCharge) { q351.fields.description = "Somebody broke into your locker overnight. They pried the latch with a flathead screwdriver, from the look of it, and stole the a black notebook you keep shoved behind your chemistry textbook, one you’ve never shown to a single living soul. Inside it is a poem you wrote about Heather, the Little Red-Haired Girl, and it is exactly as pathetic and desperate as you’d expect from a seventeen-year-old boy. To your displeasure, photocopies of it have been taped to just about every locker. The good news is that, thanks to Patty’s well-oiled campaign machine, she and your supporters are already tearing them down before second period. Still, as you round the corner, Heather is holding one of the surviving flyers. Oh God."; } else if (cynicism >= 3) { q351.fields.description = "Somebody broke into your locker overnight. They pried the latch with a flathead screwdriver, from the look of it, and stole the a black notebook you keep shoved behind your chemistry textbook, one you’ve never shown to a single living soul. Inside it is a poem you wrote about Heather, the Little Red-Haired Girl, and it is exactly as pathetic and desperate as you’d expect from a seventeen-year-old boy. It’s not just the words, exactly; it’s that for the first time, everyone can see the raw, jagged edges of the depression you’ve tried to keep buttoned under your shirt for years. You feel translucent, and it’s as if anyone who looks at you can see the old bruises on your soul. As you round the corner, Heather is holding one of the flyers. Oh God."; updateFeedback(3341, "The words don’t even make it out of your mouth properly. You just look down at your shaking hands, at the white knuckles and the bitten-down cuticles, and you realize you have nothing left to give this school. It’s like you’re a ghost. You turn and walk away before she can see the tears starting to blur your vision, hoping you can forget this day ever happened."); } } } // the car ride with Linus if (e.noCounter === 11) { const q350 = campaignTrail_temp.questions_json.find(q => q.pk === 350); if (q350) { if (ruthlessness >= 3 || linus_bond <= -2) { q350.fields.description = "The fallout from the poem leak has left you emotionally gutted, hollowed out like a jack-o’-lantern the day before Halloween, and you’re walking home alone in the rain when a car pulls up beside you, its headlights cutting through the gray October drizzle. It’s Linus’s mom’s wood-paneled station wagon, and Linus is behind the wheel. Of course, he got his license over the summer, something you still haven’t managed.

“Charlie, uh… get in.” You hesitate, the rain soaking through your jacket, and then you climb into the passenger seat. He doesn’t look at you; in fact, he is gripping the steering wheel so hard his knuckles are pure white. “This has to stop,” he says, his voice tight, almost shaking. “You’re tearing the school apart, and you’re dragging everyone down with you. Drop out, endorse me tomorrow morning, and I’ll make you Vice President. I’ll give you whatever oversight you want, just… please. Stop this.”"; updateFeedback(3338, "Linus looks genuinely surprised at your words. He studies your face for a long moment, searching for the angle, the trap, the hidden knife you’re holding, and when he doesn’t find one, he nods slowly and extends his hand to you.

The truce takes effect immediately, draining some of the venom from the final week of the campaign. Patty, very satisfied by this decision, is seen the other day violently stabbing a juice box straw through the carton hard enough to spray fruit punch onto her sweater."); updateFeedback(3337, "You open the passenger door and step back out into the downpour without looking at him, slamming it shut behind you just hard enough to rock the station wagon on its suspension, and you walk away down the shoulder of the road, with the rain streaming down your face and your shoes filling with water. You’re not going to let him hurt you anymore.

As Linus watches you go, his expression darkens as he realizes that, perhaps, that you aren’t just trying to win anymore… you’re trying to destroy him. And he’s going to have to fight back."); } } if (window.isRoyInCharge) { updateFeedback(3338, "The truce takes effect immediately. Roy is noticeably bummed out when you tell him; he was really hoping someone would throw a punch by Friday. As the final week of the campaign is drained of venom, much to his disappointment, he wonders if there’s something else going on between you two."); } } // Franklin's endorsement if (e.noCounter === 12) { const q352 = campaignTrail_temp.questions_json.find(q => q.pk === 352); if (q352) { // damn patty, back at it again with the campaign sabotage let pattyGlare = (patty_approval >= 3 && !window.isRoyInCharge) ? " Over his shoulder, you can see Patty leaning against the cinderblock wall, glaring daggers at him and mouthing something probably close to “don’t do it!”. Huh. You’ve got a choice to make." : ""; if (ruthlessness >= 3 && anti_establishment <= 1) { // generally dirty campaign q352.fields.description = "Franklin stops you by the lockers after third period. He’s the current Student Council Vice President, and perhaps one of the few people in this building whom you can trust. Even the administration respects his authority, which is more than you can say for anyone else under the age of forty in this building. “Charlie, I want to endorse you,” he says, his voice low enough that the passing students can’t hear. “But you’re like, playing too dirty. You’re terrorizing Linus and half the school thinks you’re a bully now. What’s happening? Here, tone down all the mudslinging, and I’ll bring the moderates to your side. No daylight, capiche?”" + pattyGlare; const a3344 = campaignTrail_temp.answers_json.find(a => a.pk === 3344); if (a3344) a3344.fields.description = "I can’t do that, Frank, I’m sorry. Linus and the administration have been playing dirty for years while you did nothing. If I stop hitting him now, I’m just letting them get away with it."; const a3346 = campaignTrail_temp.answers_json.find(a => a.pk === 3346); if (a3346) a3346.fields.description = "What!? You’re Vice President and you do nothing while Othmar walks all over us. Just stop being a coward for once, dammit. I really would appreciate if you helped me crush Linus once and for all."; updateFeedback(3344, "Franklin shakes his head, clearly disgusted by your vindictiveness. He can’t believe how you’ve turned into this. He adjusts his backpack and walks away without another word. Patty tells you later that Franklin is officially staying neutral, but he insists that your aggressive base loves that you refused to bow down."); updateFeedback(3346, "Franklin’s eyes widen slightly at your sheer ruthlessness. He genuinely cannot believe you’re sayng all of this. He’s quiet for a long time, long enough that a bell rings and the hallway empties around you. You find him the next day in the exact same place and position. Yeah, he’s definitely not endorsing you now."); } else if (anti_establishment >= 3 && ruthlessness < 3) { // more revolutionary-like q352.fields.description = "Franklin stops you by the lockers after third period. He’s the current Student Council Vice President, and perhaps one of the few people in this building whom you can trust. Even the administration respects his authority, which is more than you can say for anyone else under the age of forty in this building. “Charlie, I want to endorse you,” he says, his voice low enough that the passing students can’t hear. “But I think your platform is too radical. Really, like half the kids think you’re going to dismantle the entire council system if you win. If you cut down on your revolutionary talk, and promise some stability, then I’ll bring the moderates to your side. No daylight, capiche?”"; updateFeedback(3344, "Franklin sighs, adjusting his backpack. He respects your integrity, surely, but he thinks you’re committing political suicide. Many times, actually. He walks away down the hall without another word. When she finds out there was no deal, Patty groans that you just threw away the easiest endorsement of the campaign, but your die-hard supporters are thrilled you didn’t sell out."); updateFeedback(3345, "Remarkably, Franklin is relieved, and he publicly endorses you the next morning. However, your pivot to the center is not received so well by your more populist base. The burnouts and idealists who flocked to your campaign because you promised real change now see you as just another fake politician. Looks like we’re gonna have to brush up your reputation again."); } else { // fallback if (pattyGlare !== "") { q352.fields.description = "Franklin stops you by the lockers after third period. He’s the current Student Council Vice President, and perhaps one of the few people in this building whom you can trust. Even the administration respects his authority, which is more than you can say for anyone else under the age of forty in this building. “Charlie, I want to endorse you,” he says, his voice low enough that the passing students can’t hear. “But you’re like, scaring a bunch of kids. Half of them think you’re going to burn the school down if you win or something. You gotta tone it down a bit, you know, and I’ll bring the moderates to your side. No daylight, capiche?”"; // + pattyGlare; } } } if (window.isRoyInCharge) { updateFeedback(3344, "Franklin sighs, adjusting his backpack on his shoulder before walking away down the hall without another word, seemingly refusing to endorse either candidate. Curiously, Roy seems to be unbothered by your words. “Middle-of-the-road guys are always total narcs anyway, man.”"); } } // approaching the rumors if (e.noCounter === 13) { const q358 = campaignTrail_temp.questions_json.find(q => q.pk === 358); if (q358) { if (ruthlessness >= 4) { q358.fields.description = "A rumor’s been making the rounds, slipping from bathroom stalls to lunch tables, to the back rows where people think teachers can’t hear them: Charlie Brown’s been seeing a shrink. They say you’ve got a “depressive disorder,” that you’re not fit to be Council President, that you’re volatile, vindictive, dangerous, a school shooter-in-the-making. You know exactly where this originated; you should’ve never trusted Lucy and that five-cent psychiatric booth she used to run. No way she ever tossed your file. And meanwhile, Linus’s camp is quietly fanning the flames, painting you as a ticking time bomb."; updateFeedback(3366, "Patty doesn’t even bother calling your name this time, as she lunges, with her fingers clamping around your arm with a grip that feels wrong, too tight, too absolute, like you couldn’t pull away if you tried. She drags you into an empty classroom before you make it to the cafeteria. Her eyes search yours, frantic. “You’re out of your mind. You wanna prove them right!?” she hisses to you. And sure enough, your ruthless streak has made the rumors of your instability terrifyingly plausible to the voters."); } else if (ruthlessness <= 0) { q358.fields.description = "A rumor’s been making the rounds, slipping from bathroom stalls to lunch tables, to the back rows where people think teachers can’t hear them: Charlie Brown’s been seeing a shrink. They say you’ve got a “depressive disorder,” that you’re not fit to be Council President, that you’re too fragile, soft, and damaged to lead. They think you’re weak. You know exactly where this originated; you should’ve never trusted Lucy and that five-cent psychiatric booth she used to run. No way she ever tossed your file. And meanwhile, Linus’s camp is playing the pity card, acting “concerned” about your mental well-being to make you look incredibly weak."; } } if (window.isRoyInCharge) { updateFeedback(3366, "Your ability to fuck things up at a moment’s notice amazes me."); updateFeedback(3368, "You don’t get it, you really don’t. Why can’t people understand it? Is the problem that Charlie Brown is too sad, or is the problem that Linus Van Pelt isn’t sad enough? Against his will, Roy writes down your words and by the next day, the school hallways are filled with flyers from so-called Brownites who appreciate your words of wisdom."); } } if (e.noCounter === 14) { if (window.isRoyInCharge) { updateFeedback(3381, "Roy, who has actually slept through that particular history teacher’s class all semester, entirely agrees with you. While a few of the more strategic kids in your camp groan that you just handed Linus the moral high ground, all Roy does is tell them to “take a chill pill.”"); updateFeedback(12423, "Othmar stops drumming his fingers, and a bead of sweat forms on his temple. He may hate you, but he loves his pension more. Finally, he gives you a tight, furious nod and dismisses you. By the time you find Roy at his locker and tell him you just extorted the principal, he stares at you like you’re a rockstar. His rockstar."); // if you're not at all clean if (ruthlessness >= 3) { updateFeedback(3383, "You feel like a massive hypocrite lecturing people about decency when you’ve spent the last two months slinging mud. Roy claps you on the shoulder though, saying that at least the crowd seemed to buy it."); } else { updateFeedback(3383, "You feel exhausted lecturing people about decency when you’ve spent the last two months trying to keep your head above water. Roy claps you on the shoulder though, saying that at least the crowd seemed to buy it."); } } else { if (ruthlessness < 3) { updateFeedback(3383, "You feel exhausted lecturing people about decency when you’ve spent the last two months trying to keep your head above water in this vicious environment, but Patty assures you, with a genuine smile, that the audience really resonated with your sincerity."); } } } // Sunday town hall if (e.noCounter === 16) { const q391 = campaignTrail_temp.questions_json.find(q => q.pk === 391); if (q391) { if (cynicism >= 4) { q391.fields.description = "It’s Sunday morning. The campaign has ground you down to powder, to calcium dust, to whatever the hell is left of a person after two months of whoring themselves to the voters. Your internal polls (courtesy of Pig-Pen) miraculously show a dead heat, but honestly? You don’t even care anymore. You are scheduled for a town hall-style forum in the cafeteria at noon, where the school paper’s editorial board and a gym full of undecided voters are waiting for you to give them a reason. The thought of looking at another voter makes you want to crawl out of your own skin. As you climb on top of your old red doghouse, you wonder: why even go?"; updateFeedback(3489, "Marcie shows up forty-five minutes later with a photographer (her cousin Maynard) and a fresh cassette in her recorder, finding you lying on top of the doghouse, wearing a wrinkled flannel shirt and sneakers with no socks, and all she says is that you look like shit. Maybe you do. The interview you have with her is probably the hardest of your life, but you can’t help but chuckle at all the silly faces they make to cheer you up."); } else if (cynicism <= 0) { q391.fields.description = "It’s Sunday morning. The campaign has let you very much exhausted, despite everything. Your internal polls (courtesy of Pig-Pen) miraculously show a dead heat, as hard as it is to believe. It fills you up with hope, though. You are scheduled for a town hall-style forum in the cafeteria at noon, where the school paper’s editorial board and a gym full of undecided voters are waiting for you to give them a reason. It’s a gray November morning, and as you climb on top of your old red doghouse, you look up at the clouds and gather your strength. Do you really need to go?"; } else if (ruthlessness < 3) { q391.fields.description = "It’s Sunday morning. The campaign has ground you down to powder, to calcium dust, to whatever the hell is left of a person after two months of giving everything they have to the voters. Your internal polls miraculously show, despite everything, a dead heat, even if you find Pig-Pen’s data unreliable. You are scheduled for a town hall-style forum in the cafeteria at noon, where the school paper’s editorial board and a gym full of undecided voters are waiting for you to give them a reason. It’s a gray November morning, and as you climb on top of your old red doghouse, you lie on your back and wonder if you should really go."; } } if (window.isRoyInCharge) { updateFeedback(3487, "You lie on the doghouse for a whopping six hours. Roy, who was supposed to cover for your absence at the town hall, apparently told the auditorium you got abducted by aliens or had a vision quest. Nobody believes him, but at least he tried. Kind of."); } } if (e.noCounter === 17) { const q356 = campaignTrail_temp.questions_json.find(q => q.pk === 356); if (q356 && cynicism >= 4) { q356.fields.description = "The boys’ bathroom door swings shut behind you, and, surprise surprise, there’s Linus at the sinks, with his hands under the water like he forgot why he turned it on. You notice, under the stuttering light, that the bags under his eyes are just as dark as yours. Maybe he’s tired, just like you are. He watches you in the mirror for a moment, then turns the faucet off and speaks without turning around. “Is this what we wanted, Charlie?” he says quietly. “Tearing each other apart over something so… simple?”"; } if (ruthlessness >= 4) { answerSwapper(3360, 12379, false); answerSwapper(3361, 12390, false); } else if (linus_bond >= 3) { answerSwapper(3359, 12395, false); } } if (e.noCounter === 18) { if (ruthlessness >= 5 && linus_bond < 3) { answerSwapper(3386, 12401, false); } else if (ruthlessness < 5 && linus_bond >= 3) { answerSwapper(3386, 12407, false); } if (window.isRoyInCharge) { // shameless rewrites to fit in Roy const q363 = campaignTrail_temp.questions_json.find(q => q.pk === 363); if (q363) { q363.fields.description = "It’s unbelievable. Roy somehow managed to acquire the keys to the main office PA system. You don’t ask how. “You have two minutes before the janitor finishes his rounds, dude,” he whispers to you. “Broadcast a, uh, final message to the whole school. And quick, too. Make it count.” You sit down in the principal’s swivel chair, pull the microphone toward you, and click it on. As the red broadcast light glows steady in the dark room, it casts long shadows across the filing cabinets and the framed portraits of former principals, who all look vaguely disappointed in you."; } updateFeedback(3385, "“Well, at least you’ve never been a buzzkill,” Roy laughs as you both scramble out the side door before the janitor catches you. He tosses you a half-empty bag of chips as a reward once you hit the parking lot. You guess you’ve had worse speech coaches."); updateFeedback(3386, "“Damn, Chuck. Remind me never to get on your bad side,” Roy mutters as you cut the mic. He’s laughing, but even he looks a little unnerved by how incredibly cold you sounded. It amazes a couple of students who had not seen the dark side of your campaign."); updateFeedback(3387, "You click the microphone off, exhaustion written all over your face. Roy blinks, slightly out of his depth, though he seems genuinely surprised, and awkwardly offers you a sip of his Sprite®. You decline, but walk out into the empty hallway feeling a little less heavy."); updateFeedback(12401, "Of course, Roy lets out a loud, obnoxious laugh as the broadcast ends. He’s eating this drama up like it’s prime-time television. Last time you saw him this happy was when you loaned him 200 bucks so he could visit his grandma in Peru. In the hallways, however, the silence of the student body is absolutely deafening."); updateFeedback(12407, "Roy looks intensely disappointed, having tuned in hoping for a total meltdown. “This is… uh… a bit anti-climactic, don’t you think?” And he sighs. But when you click the microphone off, you ignore him, feeling a massive weight lift off your chest. For the first time in weeks, you think, you can breathe."); } } if (e.noCounter === 19) { // narrative adjustments in general if (window.isRoyInCharge) { const q360 = campaignTrail_temp.questions_json.find(q => q.pk === 360); if (q360) { q360.fields.description = "It’s Election Night, and the rain hasn’t stopped since three o’clock. Roy called from a payphone to drag you down to the watch party at the bowling alley, but you told him you were done for the night and hung up. You couldn’t stomach the noise, the plastic cups, or the anxious stares. Tired, you walked home alone in the dark.

Soaking wet, you sink into the living room couch and turn on the television. On the screen, you sigh as national anchors sweat over razor-thin margins in places you never heard of; the whole world feels like it’s fracturing. Then, you hear the soft clicking of claws on the linoleum as Snoopy walks in. He’s a bit older now, but remains as wise as always. He rests his heavy chin on your knee, looking up with quiet eyes, as the weight of the last two months finally crashes down on you."; } if (ruthlessness >= 3) { updateFeedback(3375, "The words crack in your throat, apologizing to him, but also to yourself, to Linus, to Patty, to Roy (wherever he is right now), and to the kid you once used to be. Who knows? If you ran fast enough, you’d finally kick that goddamn football… Snoopy lets out a soft whine, nudging his wet nose under your hand. You oblige, stroking his ears as the news anchors on the television announce it’s going to be a long night.

You pull him into a tight hug, burying your tears in his coat, and fall asleep on the couch, exhausted."); } else { updateFeedback(3375, "The words crack in your throat, thanking him, but also thanking yourself, Linus, Patty, Roy (wherever he is right now), and the kid you once used to be for surviving this long. Who knows? If you ran fast enough, you’d finally kick that goddamn football… Snoopy lets out a soft whine, nudging his wet nose under your hand. You oblige, stroking his ears as the news anchors on the television announce it’s going to be a long night.

You pull him into a tight hug, burying your tears in his coat, and fall asleep on the couch, exhausted."); } } else { if (ruthlessness < 3) { updateFeedback(3375, "The words crack in your throat, as you thank him for being there for you, but also thank yourself, Linus, Patty, and the kid you used to be for surviving this long. Who knows? If you ran fast enough, you’d finally kick that goddamn football… Snoopy lets out a soft, low whine, nudging his wet nose under your hand, as he demands to be petted. You oblige, stroking his ears as the news anchors on the television announce that it’s going to be a long, drawn-out night.

You pull him into a tight hug, burying your tears in his coat, and fall asleep on the couch, exhausted."); } } // clean-ish? campaign if (ruthlessness < 3) { updateFeedback(3374, "The TV keeps buzzing with the sounds of pundits arguing over a lot of things, but the noise fades into the background as you bury your face in his fur. He doesn’t judge you for the stress you’ve carried, or the speeches you gave, or the poems they laughed at. You pull him close, wrapping your arms around him, holding on to the last pure thing you have left from childhood, until your eyes grow heavy and you fall asleep to the sound of the rain against the glass."); updateFeedback(3376, "You’ve tried to be good, even when it was impossibly hard to do so. And Snoopy knows that. He doesn’t care about the presidency, or the student council, or the chaos unfolding on the television screen; no, he just rests his paws on your lap, licking the back of your hand. You wrap your arms around him, pulling him up to your chest as the rain lashes against the windowpane. The 20th century dies on the broadcast in front of you as you hold your friend until the screen goes to static."); } } // achievement unlocks const ansSet = new Set(campaignTrail_temp.player_answers); const singleAchievements = [ [12440, "A Red Letter Day"], [3333, "Lady Lazarus"], [3316, "Bastards of Young"], [12448, "Price of Fame"], [12407, "Transatlanticism"] ]; for (const [id, name] of singleAchievements) { if (ansSet.has(id)) { unlockAchievement(name); } } const anyOfAchievements = [ { ids: [3360, 12395], name: "Blurred Image" } ]; for (const { ids, name } of anyOfAchievements) { if (ids.some(id => ansSet.has(id))) { unlockAchievement(name); } } const allOfAchievements = [ { ids: [3397, 12431], name: "Justice Aversion" }, { ids: [12423, 3333, 3431], name: "Cherub Rock" }, { ids: [3323, 3376, 3487], name: "It Always Comes as a Surprise" } ]; for (const { ids, name } of allOfAchievements) { if (ids.every(id => ansSet.has(id))) { unlockAchievement(name); } } } // Campaign Data popup ;(() => { const styleEl = document.createElement("style"); styleEl.textContent = ` #gameStatsPopup { position: fixed; bottom: 20px; right: 20px; width: 640px; background-color: #f4f4f5; border: 2px solid #0f172a; box-shadow: 6px 6px 0px rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.15); z-index: 10000; font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 13.5px; color: #0f172a; display: flex; flex-direction: column; transition: width 0.2s ease; } #gameStatsPopup.minimized { width: 380px; } #gameStatsPopupHeader { background-color: #0f172a; color: #ffffff; margin: 0; padding: 8px 12px; font-weight: bold; font-size: 13px; letter-spacing: 1px; display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; cursor: move; } .header-buttons { display: flex; gap: 12px; align-items: center; } .hdr-btn { background: none; border: none; color: #ffffff; font-size: 16px; font-weight: bold; cursor: pointer; line-height: 1; padding: 0 4px; } .hdr-btn:hover { color: #ef4444; } #min_stats_btn:hover { color: #60a5fa; } #gameStatsTabs { display: flex; background-color: #e2e8f0; border-bottom: 2px solid #0f172a; } #gameStatsPopup.minimized #gameStatsTabs { display: none; } .tab-btn { flex: 1; padding: 8px; background: none; border: none; font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-weight: bold; font-size: 12px; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 1px; color: #475569; cursor: pointer; } .tab-btn:last-child { border-right: none; } .tab-btn.active { background-color: #f4f4f5; color: #0f172a; border-bottom: 2px solid #f4f4f5; margin-bottom: -2px; } .tab-btn:hover:not(.active) { background-color: #cbd5e1; } #gameStatsContent { display: flex; flex-direction: row; padding: 16px; gap: 24px; min-height: 280px; } #gameStatsPopup.minimized #gameStatsContent { display: none; } /* minimzed tab */ #minimizedContent { display: none; } #gameStatsPopup.minimized #minimizedContent { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; padding: 12px; min-height: 60px; background-color: #f4f4f5; } .min-arrow-btn { background: #e2e8f0; border: 1px solid #cbd5e1; color: #0f172a; border-radius: 4px; font-size: 12px; padding: 6px 10px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.2s; } .min-arrow-btn:hover { background: #cbd5e1; } .min-arrow-btn:active { transform: translateY(1px); } #min_data_display { flex: 1; text-align: center; font-size: 12px; padding: 0 12px; line-height: 1.4; } .stats-column { flex: 1; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 12px; } .col-title { font-size: 11px; font-weight: bold; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 1px; color: #64748b; border-bottom: 1px solid #cbd5e1; padding-bottom: 4px; margin-bottom: 4px; } .stat-item { margin-bottom: 10px; line-height: 1.5; } .stat-val { font-family: IBM Courier, 'Courier New', Courier, monospace; font-weight: bold; } .bar-container { margin-bottom: 12px; } .bar-header { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; font-size: 12px; margin-bottom: 4px; font-weight: 600; } .bar-bg { width: 100%; background: #e2e8f0; border: 1px solid #94a3b8; height: 12px; position: relative; } .bar-fill { height: 100%; transition: width 0.3s ease; } #compass-wrapper { width: 100%; display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; justify-content: center; } #compass-container { position: relative; width: 240px; height: 240px; background: repeating-linear-gradient(0deg, transparent, transparent 19px, rgba(15,23,42,0.15) 20px), repeating-linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, transparent 19px, rgba(15,23,42,0.15) 20px), conic-gradient( from 0deg, #bfdbfe 0deg 90deg, #fde68a 90deg 180deg, #bbf7d0 180deg 270deg, #fecaca 270deg 360deg ); border: 2px solid #0f172a; margin-bottom: 15px; } .compass-axis { position: absolute; background: #0f172a; } .compass-axis.vertical { width: 2px; height: 100%; left: 50%; top: 0; transform: translateX(-50%); } .compass-axis.horizontal { width: 100%; height: 2px; top: 50%; left: 0; transform: translateY(-50%); } .compass-label { position: absolute; font-size: 9px; font-weight: bold; font-family: IBM Courier, 'Courier New', Courier, monospace; color: #475569; background: #f4f4f5; padding: 0 4px; letter-spacing: 0.5px; } .lbl-top { top: -6px; left: 50%; transform: translateX(-50%); } .lbl-bottom { bottom: -6px; left: 50%; transform: translateX(-50%); } .lbl-left { left: -6px; top: 50%; transform: translateY(-50%) rotate(-90deg); transform-origin: center; } .lbl-right { right: -6px; top: 50%; transform: translateY(-50%) rotate(90deg); transform-origin: center; } #compass-marker { position: absolute; width: 24px; height: 24px; background: url('https://file.garden/aNtAfG887DiA_7lO/TML_2000/charliehead.jpg') center/cover; border: 2px solid #0f172a; border-radius: 50%; transform: translate(-50%, -50%); transition: top 0.4s ease, left 0.4s ease; } #ideology-caption { font-size: 14px; font-weight: bold; letter-spacing: 1px; text-align: center; padding: 6px 12px; background: #0f172a; color: #fff; border-radius: 2px; } #btn_game_stats { margin-left: 1.5em; padding: .25em .5em; } #btn_game_stats:active { transform: translate(2px, 2px); box-shadow: 0px 0px 0px rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.2); } `; document.head.appendChild(styleEl); let activeTab = "demographics"; // 'demographics' or 'compass' let isMinimized = false; let minimizedIndex = 0; const bold = (text, color) => `${text}`; function matchTier(value, tiers) { for (const [max, text] of tiers) { if (value <= max) return text; } return tiers.at(-1)[1]; } function getInternalStats() { const roy = window.isRoyInCharge || false; return [ { getValue: () => ruthlessness, tiers: [ [-1, `Charlie Brown is running an ${bold("honest", "#22c55e")} campaign.`], [1, `Charlie Brown is trying to ${bold("play fair", "#64748b")}.`], [3, `Charlie Brown is starting to ${bold("cut corners", "#eab308")}.`], [5, `Charlie Brown's hands are ${bold("dirty", "#f97316")}.`], [Infinity, `Charlie Brown is a total ${bold("sociopath", "#ef4444")}.`], ], }, { getValue: () => linus_bond, tiers: [ [-8, `Charlie Brown would sell Linus for a ${bold("corn dog", "#ef4444")}.`], [-5, `Charlie Brown and Linus are ${bold("bitter rivals", "#ef4444")}.`], [-3, `Charlie Brown actively ${bold("dislikes", "#d97706")} Linus.`], [-1, `Charlie Brown barely ${bold("tolerates", "#ca8a04")} Linus.`], [0, `Charlie Brown and Linus are currently ${bold("estranged", "#475569")}.`], [1, `Charlie Brown and Linus are ${bold("on speaking terms", "#475569")}.`], [3, `Charlie Brown and Linus still have ${bold("some respect", "#10b981")}.`], [Infinity, `Charlie Brown and Linus ${bold("miss each other", "#10b981")}.`], ], }, { getValue: () => cynicism, tiers: [ [-3, `Charlie Brown is in ${bold("heaven", "#16a34a")}.`], [-1, `Charlie Brown still has some ${bold("hope", "#22c55e")}.`], [2, `Charlie Brown runs on the usual ${bold("teenage angst", "#64748b")}.`], [4, `Charlie Brown is quite ${bold("exhausted", "#f97316")}.`], [Infinity, `Charlie Brown is on ${bold("suicide watch", "#ef4444")}.`], ], }, { getValue: () => anti_establishment, tiers: [ [-1, `Charlie Brown is seen as part of the ${bold("establishment", "#ef4444")}.`], [0, `Charlie Brown is ${bold("playing it safe", "#64748b")}.`], [1, `Charlie Brown is seen as a ${bold("moderate reformer", "#eab308")}.`], [4, `Charlie Brown is seen as a ${bold("populist firebrand", "#f97316")}.`], [Infinity, `Charlie Brown is basically seen as ${bold("Robespierre", "#ef4444")}.`], ], }, { getValue: () => patty_approval, tiers: [ [-1, roy ? `Patty is ${bold("genuinely horrified", "#ef4444")} by what Charlie’s campaign became.` : `Patty thinks Charlie Brown is a ${bold("spineless loser", "#ef4444")}.`], [0, roy ? `Patty is ${bold("glad she jumped off", "#d97706")} this sinking ship.` : `Patty thinks Charlie Brown is a ${bold("lost cause", "#f97316")}.`], [1, roy ? `Patty is watching from afar with ${bold("mixed feelings", "#ca8a04")}.` : `Patty finds Charlie Brown ${bold("frustrating", "#ca8a04")}.`], [4, roy ? `Patty admits Charlie is doing ${bold("okay without her", "#10b981")}.` : `Patty is ${bold("surprisingly satisfied", "#22c55e")} with the Charlie Brown campaign.`], [Infinity, roy ? `Patty secretly ${bold("regrets stepping down", "#10b981")}.` : `Patty thinks Charlie Brown is the ${bold("second coming of Marx", "#16a34a")}.`], ], } ]; } const BAR_MIN = -2; const BAR_MAX = 6; const FACTION_TIERS = { "The Burnouts": ["Narc", "Whatever, man", "Good Vibes", "Grunge God"], "Honors Kids": ["Plebeian", "Waitlisted", "Acceptable", "Valedictorian"], "The Jocks": ["Waterboy", "Benchwarmer", "Varsity", "Quarterback"], "Arts & Theatre": ["Philistine", "Understudy", "Leading Role", "Auteur"], "Administration": ["Expelled", "Detention", "Hall Monitor", "Principal’s Pet"] }; function getFactionStatus(label, value) { let tiers = FACTION_TIERS[label]; if (value <= 0) return tiers[0]; if (value <= 2) return tiers[1]; if (value <= 4) return tiers[2]; return tiers[3]; } function createBarHTML(label, value, color) { let pct = Math.max(0, Math.min(100, ((value - BAR_MIN) / (BAR_MAX - BAR_MIN)) * 100)); let statusText = getFactionStatus(label, value); return `
${label} [${value > 0 ? '+'+value : value}] ${statusText}
`; } // compass logic function getIdeologyName(x_pct, y_pct) { const isPopulist = y_pct < 50; const isRuthless = x_pct > 50; if (y_pct < 20 && x_pct > 80) return "a vengeful demagogue"; if (y_pct < 20 && x_pct < 20) return "an idealistic revolutionary"; if (y_pct > 80 && x_pct > 80) return "a corrupt party boss"; if (y_pct > 80 && x_pct < 20) return "a quirky institutionalist"; if (isPopulist && isRuthless) return "a Machiavellian outsider"; if (isPopulist && !isRuthless) return "an earnest reformer"; if (!isPopulist && isRuthless) return "an establishment enforcer"; if (!isPopulist && !isRuthless) return "just plain boring"; return "a so-called pragmatic centrist"; } function renderCompass() { let x_pct = ((ruthlessness - BAR_MIN) / (BAR_MAX - BAR_MIN)) * 100; let y_pct = ((BAR_MAX - anti_establishment) / (BAR_MAX - BAR_MIN)) * 100; x_pct = Math.max(0, Math.min(100, x_pct)); y_pct = Math.max(0, Math.min(100, y_pct)); let ideology = getIdeologyName(x_pct, y_pct); return `
POPULIST
INSTITUTIONAL
IDEALIST
RUTHLESS
You are seen as: ${ideology}
`; } function renderDemographics() { const textLines = getInternalStats().map(({ getValue, tiers }) => { const val = getValue(); return `
• ${matchTier(val, tiers)} [${val > 0 ? '+'+val : val}]
`; }); let leftHTML = `
Charlie's Subroutine
${textLines.join("")}
`; let rightHTML = `
Demographic Support
${createBarHTML("The Burnouts", support_burnouts, "#d97706")} ${createBarHTML("Honors Kids", support_honors, "#2563eb")} ${createBarHTML("The Jocks", support_jocks, "#dc2626")} ${createBarHTML("Arts & Theatre", support_arts, "#7c3aed")} ${createBarHTML("Administration", support_admin, "#059669")}
`; return leftHTML + rightHTML; } // for the minimized slider view function getMinimizedDataList() { let list = []; getInternalStats().forEach(stat => { let val = stat.getValue(); list.push(`${matchTier(val, stat.tiers)} [${val > 0 ? '+'+val : val}]`); }); const factions = [ { label: "The Burnouts", val: support_burnouts, color: "#d97706" }, { label: "Honors Kids", val: support_honors, color: "#2563eb" }, { label: "The Jocks", val: support_jocks, color: "#dc2626" }, { label: "Arts & Theatre", val: support_arts, color: "#7c3aed" }, { label: "Administration", val: support_admin, color: "#059669" } ]; factions.forEach(f => { let status = getFactionStatus(f.label, f.val); list.push(`${f.label}: ${bold(status, f.color)} [${f.val > 0 ? '+'+f.val : f.val}]`); }); let x_pct = Math.max(0, Math.min(100, ((ruthlessness - BAR_MIN) / (BAR_MAX - BAR_MIN)) * 100)); let y_pct = Math.max(0, Math.min(100, ((BAR_MAX - anti_establishment) / (BAR_MAX - BAR_MIN)) * 100)); list.push(`Political Matrix:
You are seen as ${getIdeologyName(x_pct, y_pct)}.`); return list; } function updateGameStatsPopup() { const popup = document.getElementById("gameStatsPopup"); const content = document.getElementById("gameStatsContent"); const tabDemo = document.getElementById("tab_demo"); const tabCompass = document.getElementById("tab_compass"); const minDisplay = document.getElementById("min_data_display"); if (!popup || !content || !tabDemo || !tabCompass || !minDisplay) return; if (isMinimized) { let dataList = getMinimizedDataList(); if (minimizedIndex >= dataList.length) minimizedIndex = 0; if (minimizedIndex < 0) minimizedIndex = dataList.length - 1; minDisplay.innerHTML = dataList[minimizedIndex]; } else { if (activeTab === "demographics") { tabDemo.classList.add("active"); tabCompass.classList.remove("active"); content.innerHTML = renderDemographics(); } else { tabCompass.classList.add("active"); tabDemo.classList.remove("active"); content.innerHTML = renderCompass(); } } } function createGameStatsPopup() { if (document.getElementById("gameStatsPopup")) return; const popup = document.createElement("div"); popup.id = "gameStatsPopup"; popup.style.display = "none"; popup.innerHTML = `
Campaign Data
`; document.body.appendChild(popup); document.getElementById("tab_demo").addEventListener("click", () => { activeTab = "demographics"; updateGameStatsPopup(); }); document.getElementById("tab_compass").addEventListener("click", () => { activeTab = "compass"; updateGameStatsPopup(); }); document.getElementById("min_prev_btn").addEventListener("click", () => { const dataLength = getMinimizedDataList().length; minimizedIndex = (minimizedIndex - 1 + dataLength) % dataLength; updateGameStatsPopup(); }); document.getElementById("min_next_btn").addEventListener("click", () => { const dataLength = getMinimizedDataList().length; minimizedIndex = (minimizedIndex + 1) % dataLength; updateGameStatsPopup(); }); document.getElementById("min_stats_btn").addEventListener("click", () => { isMinimized = !isMinimized; const minBtn = document.getElementById("min_stats_btn"); if (isMinimized) { popup.classList.add("minimized"); minBtn.textContent = "+"; } else { popup.classList.remove("minimized"); minBtn.textContent = "−"; } updateGameStatsPopup(); }); document.getElementById("close_stats_btn").addEventListener("click", () => { popup.style.display = "none"; }); makePopupDraggable(popup); updateGameStatsPopup(); } function makePopupDraggable(el) { let offsetX, offsetY; const header = el.querySelector("#gameStatsPopupHeader"); function onMouseMove(e) { const maxX = window.innerWidth - el.offsetWidth; const maxY = window.innerHeight - el.offsetHeight; el.style.left = `${Math.max(0, Math.min(e.clientX - offsetX, maxX))}px`; el.style.top = `${Math.max(0, Math.min(e.clientY - offsetY, maxY))}px`; el.style.bottom = "auto"; el.style.right = "auto"; } function onMouseUp() { document.removeEventListener("mousemove", onMouseMove); document.removeEventListener("mouseup", onMouseUp); } header.addEventListener("mousedown", (e) => { if(e.target.closest('.hdr-btn')) return; const rect = el.getBoundingClientRect(); offsetX = e.clientX - rect.left; offsetY = e.clientY - rect.top; document.addEventListener("mousemove", onMouseMove); document.addEventListener("mouseup", onMouseUp); }); } function toggleGameStatsPopup() { const popup = document.getElementById("gameStatsPopup"); if (!popup) return; const showing = popup.style.display === "none"; popup.style.display = showing ? "flex" : "none"; if (showing) updateGameStatsPopup(); } function injectGameStatsButton() { if (document.getElementById("btn_game_stats")) return; const anchor = document.getElementById("view_electoral_map"); if (!anchor) return; const btn = document.createElement("button"); btn.id = "btn_game_stats"; btn.textContent = "Campaign Data"; btn.addEventListener("click", (e) => { e.preventDefault(); toggleGameStatsPopup(); }); anchor.insertAdjacentElement("afterend", btn); } createGameStatsPopup(); const gameWindow = document.getElementById("game_window"); if (gameWindow) { new MutationObserver(() => { injectGameStatsButton(); updateGameStatsPopup(); }).observe(gameWindow, { childList: true, subtree: true }); } })(); // Victory/loss calculator let fixedCliqueResults = null; function calculateCliqueResults() { // if we already calculated this run, return the cached result if (fixedCliqueResults !== null) { return fixedCliqueResults; } let cur_ruthless = typeof ruthlessness !== 'undefined' ? ruthlessness : 0; let cur_patty = typeof patty_approval !== 'undefined' ? patty_approval : 0; let cur_anti = typeof anti_establishment !== 'undefined' ? anti_establishment : 0; let cur_linus = typeof linus_bond !== 'undefined' ? linus_bond : 0; let cur_cynicism = typeof cynicism !== 'undefined' ? cynicism : 0; // write-in sentiment goes up if the school is cynical or highly anti-establishment let baseWriteInShare = 0.015; if (cur_ruthless >= 3) baseWriteInShare += 0.015; if (cur_patty <= -2) baseWriteInShare += 0.02; if (cur_anti >= 5) baseWriteInShare += 0.02; if (cur_cynicism >= 5) baseWriteInShare += 0.02; // basically each clique calculates Charlie's share differently // based on their specific values & traits const cliques = [ { name: "Burnouts", pop: 120, baseShare: 0.35, support: typeof support_burnouts !== 'undefined' ? support_burnouts : 0, // burnouts love anti-establishment & Patty calcCharlieMod: function() { return (this.support * 0.025) + (cur_anti * 0.015) + (cur_patty * 0.005); } }, { name: "Honors", pop: 85, baseShare: 0.55, support: typeof support_honors !== 'undefined' ? support_honors : 0, // honors hate anti-establishment; they like Linus slightly, but mostly stick to the rules calcCharlieMod: function() { return (this.support * 0.04) - (cur_anti * 0.02) - (cur_linus * 0.005); } }, { name: "Jocks", pop: 150, baseShare: 0.35, support: typeof support_jocks !== 'undefined' ? support_jocks : 0, // jocks follow Patty's approval religiously calcCharlieMod: function() { return (this.support * 0.04) + (cur_patty * 0.015) - (cur_cynicism * 0.01) - (cur_anti * 0.005); } }, { name: "Arts", pop: 70, baseShare: 0.50, support: typeof support_arts !== 'undefined' ? support_arts : 0, // arts students vibe with cynicism but hate ruthlessness calcCharlieMod: function() { return (this.support * 0.04) + (cur_cynicism * 0.01) - (cur_ruthless * 0.015) - (cur_patty * 0.005); } }, { name: "Admin/Faculty", pop: 25, baseShare: 0.35, support: typeof support_admin !== 'undefined' ? support_admin : 0, // admin plummets with anti-establishment and ruthlessness. hard for charlie to do good here calcCharlieMod: function() { return (this.support * 0.04) - (cur_anti * 0.03) - (cur_ruthless * 0.015); } } ]; let charlieTotal = 0, linusTotal = 0, writeInTotal = 0, totalPop = 0; let rowsData = []; // calculate the raw data for all cliques cliques.forEach(c => { totalPop += c.pop; let rngSwing = ((Math.random() + Math.random()) - 1) * 0.04; // -4% to +4% random noise let charlieShare = c.baseShare + c.calcCharlieMod() + rngSwing; let cliqueWriteIn = baseWriteInShare + (((Math.random() * 2) - 1) * 0.015); cliqueWriteIn = Math.max(0, cliqueWriteIn); // clamp shares charlieShare = Math.max(0, Math.min(1 - cliqueWriteIn, charlieShare)); // initial vote rounding let charlieVotes = Math.round(c.pop * charlieShare); let writeInVotes = Math.round(c.pop * cliqueWriteIn); // safeguard against rare bug causing them to exceed population if (charlieVotes + writeInVotes > c.pop) { if (charlieVotes > writeInVotes) charlieVotes--; else writeInVotes--; } let linusVotes = c.pop - charlieVotes - writeInVotes; // recalculate true percentages based strictly on rounded votes let dispCharlie = ((charlieVotes / c.pop) * 100).toFixed(1); let dispLinus = ((linusVotes / c.pop) * 100).toFixed(1); let dispWriteIn = ((writeInVotes / c.pop) * 100).toFixed(1); charlieTotal += charlieVotes; linusTotal += linusVotes; writeInTotal += writeInVotes; rowsData.push({ name: c.name, pop: c.pop, charlieVotes, dispCharlie, linusVotes, dispLinus, writeInVotes, dispWriteIn }); }); // handle write-in distribution organically let writeInListHTML = ""; if (writeInTotal > 0) { // higher weight = more likely to appear on the final list const weightedNames = [ // high probability { name: "Snoopy", weight: 40 }, { name: "Peppermint Patty", weight: 35 }, { name: "Pig-Pen", weight: 30 }, { name: "Joe Cool", weight: 25 }, { name: "Marcie", weight: 20 }, { name: "Schroeder", weight: 15 }, { name: "Franklin", weight: 15 }, { name: "\"The Great Pumpkin\"", weight: 25 }, { name: "None of the above", weight: 30 }, { name: "Mickey Mouse", weight: 20 }, { name: "Batman", weight: 15 }, { name: "Deez Nuts", weight: 15 }, // medium probability { name: "Ralph Nader", weight: 10 }, { name: "George W. Bush", weight: 10 }, { name: "Al Gore", weight: 10 }, { name: "Bill Clinton", weight: 12 }, { name: "Britney Spears", weight: 12 }, { name: "Eminem", weight: 10 }, { name: "Tony Hawk", weight: 10 }, { name: "Stone Cold Steve Austin", weight: 10 }, { name: "The Rock", weight: 8 }, { name: "Homer Simpson", weight: 10 }, { name: "Eric Cartman", weight: 10 }, { name: "Goku", weight: 8 }, // low probability { name: "Karl Marx", weight: 5 }, { name: "Eugene Debs", weight: 4 }, { name: "Michael Parenti", weight: 3 }, { name: "Friedrich Nietzsche", weight: 4 }, { name: "Steve Jobs", weight: 5 }, { name: "Robert Rubin", weight: 2 }, { name: "Dewey Wilkerson", weight: 3 }, { name: "Giant Meteor", weight: 5 }, { name: "Monica Lewinsky", weight: 5 }, { name: "Usama bin Laden", weight: 2 }, { name: "The Guy from Next Friday", weight: 3 }, { name: "Fred Durst", weight: 4 }, { name: "Kurt Cobain", weight: 4 }, { name: "Woodstock", weight: 5 } ]; // do a weighted random selection without replacement function getWeightedRandom(pool, count) { let result = []; let currentPool = [...pool]; for (let i = 0; i < count && currentPool.length > 0; i++) { let totalWeight = currentPool.reduce((sum, item) => sum + item.weight, 0); let random = Math.random() * totalWeight; let cumulative = 0; for (let j = 0; j < currentPool.length; j++) { cumulative += currentPool[j].weight; if (random <= cumulative) { result.push(currentPool[j].name); currentPool.splice(j, 1); // remove so we don't pick the same name twice break; } } } return result; } // grab 4 to 8 random names from the pool let numNames = Math.min(Math.floor(Math.random() * 5) + 4, weightedNames.length); let selectedNames = getWeightedRandom(weightedNames, numNames); // create an exponential distribution so 1 or 2 names get // most of the write-ins, and the rest get 1-2 votes let weightsForVotes = selectedNames.map((_, i) => Math.pow(0.5, i) * (0.8 + Math.random() * 0.4)); let totalVoteWeight = weightsForVotes.reduce((sum, w) => sum + w, 0); let breakdown = selectedNames.map((name, i) => { return { name: name, votes: Math.round((weightsForVotes[i] / totalVoteWeight) * writeInTotal) }; }); // correct rounding errors by adding/subtracting from the most popular write-in let currentTotal = breakdown.reduce((sum, item) => sum + item.votes, 0); breakdown[0].votes += (writeInTotal - currentTotal); // filter out zeroes, sort highest to lowest, and format let breakdownStrings = breakdown .filter(item => item.votes > 0) .sort((a, b) => b.votes - a.votes) .map(item => `${item.name} (${item.votes})`); writeInListHTML = `
Write-in distribution: ${breakdownStrings.join(", ")}
`; } // build table HTML let tableRows = ""; let charlieCliquesWon = 0; rowsData.forEach(r => { let winnerText = "Tie"; let winnerColor = "#000"; if (r.charlieVotes > r.linusVotes && r.charlieVotes > r.writeInVotes) { winnerText = "Charlie"; winnerColor = "#d32f2f"; charlieCliquesWon++; } else if (r.linusVotes > r.charlieVotes && r.linusVotes > r.writeInVotes) { winnerText = "Linus"; winnerColor = "#2f52d3"; } else if (r.writeInVotes > r.charlieVotes && r.writeInVotes > r.linusVotes) { winnerText = "Write-In"; winnerColor = "#4caf50"; } tableRows += ` ${r.name} ${r.pop} ${r.charlieVotes} (${r.dispCharlie}%) ${r.linusVotes} (${r.dispLinus}%) ${writeInTotal > 0 ? `${r.writeInVotes} (${r.dispWriteIn}%)` : ''} ${winnerText} `; }); let totalWinner = charlieTotal > linusTotal ? "CHARLIE" : (linusTotal > charlieTotal ? "LINUS" : "TIE"); let totalWinnerColor = charlieTotal > linusTotal ? "#d32f2f" : (linusTotal > charlieTotal ? "#2f52d3" : "#000000"); let tableHTML = `

Final Election Results

${writeInTotal > 0 ? `` : ''} ${tableRows} ${writeInTotal > 0 ? `` : ''}
Clique Pop. Charlie LinusWrite-InWinner
TOTAL ${totalPop} ${charlieTotal} ${linusTotal}${writeInTotal}${totalWinner}
${writeInListHTML}
`; // cache the results so they never recalculate if called again in the same run fixedCliqueResults = { charlieWin: charlieTotal > linusTotal, linusWin: linusTotal > charlieTotal, itsATie: charlieTotal === linusTotal, charlieCleanSweep: charlieCliquesWon === 5, tableHTML }; return fixedCliqueResults; } // This will change the election night song (function () { const originalHtml = $.fn.html; let bypassInterceptor = false; $.fn.html = function (htmlString, ...args) { if ( !bypassInterceptor && this.attr("id") === "game_window" && typeof htmlString === "string" && htmlString.includes("election_night_overlay") ) { if (typeof window.playEndingSong === "function") { window.playEndingSong( "Loop De Li (First Draft)", "Bryan Ferry", "https://yt3.googleusercontent.com/pvgvYRppJKsEJgbYygbFw0bMbhF4Gw5eLE3ElZFN_IU515LpEYgJRvKcdzsgxk0szxMS8XeTM6wXshg=w544-h544-l90-rj", "7O1J--nOKm8" ); } if (window.campaignTrail_temp?.dynamicEN && typeof window.runDynamicElectionNight === "function") { bypassInterceptor = true; try { const type = campaignTrail_temp.primary ? 'primary' : 'general'; window.runDynamicElectionNight(type); } catch (e) { console.error("Error launching dynamic election night:", e); } bypassInterceptor = false; return this; } } return originalHtml.apply(this, [htmlString, ...args]); }; })(); // Pretty much a watered-down-ish version of the loader from LBM/ALOT campaignTrail_temp.multiple_endings = true; campaignTrail_temp.page = 0; campaignTrail_temp.pages = []; campaignTrail_temp.header = ""; campaignTrail_temp.image = false; campaignTrail_temp.executable = {}; window.endingImageSystem = (() => { let currentTargetImage = null; let active = false; function enforce() { // if inactive or no target, do nothing if (!active || !currentTargetImage) return; const img = document.querySelector(".person_image"); if (!img) return; if (img.getAttribute("src") !== currentTargetImage) { img.src = currentTargetImage; } // only force display block if we are actually active if (img.style.display === 'none') { img.style.display = 'block'; } } function setImage(url) { currentTargetImage = url; active = true; enforce(); } function reset() { active = false; currentTargetImage = null; } return { setImage, enforce, reset }; })(); window.setImage = window.endingImageSystem.setImage; // for the scroll container const extraEndingStyles = new CSSStyleSheet(); extraEndingStyles.replaceSync(` #main-ending-scroll-container { contain: content; -webkit-overflow-scrolling: touch; height: 38em; overflow: auto; position: relative; } .slide-wrapper { width: 100%; animation: slideFadeIn 0.4s ease-out forwards; } @keyframes slideFadeIn { from { opacity: 0; } to { opacity: 1; } } /* ensure images don't cause layout shifts during load */ /*.slide-wrapper img { max-width: 100%; height: auto; }*/ #expand-ending-btn { position: absolute; bottom: 10px; left: 10px; z-index: 100; } #expand-ending-modal { position: fixed; top: 5%; left: 10%; width: 80%; height: 80%; background: #f4f4f4; color: #333; z-index: 9999; padding: 2em; border: 2px solid #333; border-radius: 8px; box-shadow: 0 0 20px rgba(0,0,0,0.5); overflow-y: auto; display: none; } #expand-modal-close { float: right; margin-bottom: 1em; } `); if (!document.adoptedStyleSheets.includes(extraEndingStyles)) { document.adoptedStyleSheets = [...document.adoptedStyleSheets, extraEndingStyles]; } // image preloader function preloadEndingAssets() { if (!campaignTrail_temp.pages) return; Object.values(campaignTrail_temp.executable || {}).forEach(func => { // this is a rough heuristic to catch image sets const str = func.toString(); const match = str.match(/['"](https?:\/\/[^'"]+)['"]/); if (match) { new Image().src = match[1]; } }); // scan HTML content for tags campaignTrail_temp.pages.forEach(html => { const parser = new DOMParser(); const doc = parser.parseFromString(html, 'text/html'); const imgs = doc.querySelectorAll('img'); imgs.forEach(img => { new Image().src = img.src; }); }); } // construct the HTML for the ending page let resetPage = false; let currentSlide = null; window.endingConstructor = (direction = 1) => { // handle page indexing if (resetPage) { direction = 0; resetPage = false; } const oldPage = campaignTrail_temp.page; const newPage = oldPage + direction; if (newPage < 0 || newPage >= campaignTrail_temp.pages.length) { return; // out of bounds } campaignTrail_temp.page = newPage; let scrollContainer = document.getElementById("main-ending-scroll-container"); let narrativeDiv = document.getElementById("endingtxt"); let buttonProxy = document.getElementById("ending-button-proxy"); if (!scrollContainer) { const finalDesc = document.getElementById("final_results_description"); const shellFragment = document.createDocumentFragment(); // container scrollContainer = document.createElement("div"); scrollContainer.id = "main-ending-scroll-container"; // narrative area narrativeDiv = document.createElement("div"); narrativeDiv.id = "endingtxt"; narrativeDiv.className = "ending-narrative-content"; scrollContainer.appendChild(narrativeDiv); // stats area const statsContainer = document.createElement("div"); statsContainer.id = "ending-stats-container"; statsContainer.style.paddingTop = "1rem"; const statsIds = ["difficulty_mult", "overall_vote_statistics", "map_footer"]; statsIds.forEach(id => { const el = document.getElementById(id); if (el) { el.style.cssText = "position: relative; display: block; margin: 0.5rem 0;"; statsContainer.appendChild(el); } }); scrollContainer.appendChild(statsContainer); shellFragment.appendChild(scrollContainer); // buttons buttonProxy = document.createElement("div"); buttonProxy.id = "ending-button-proxy"; buttonProxy.className = "button_container"; buttonProxy.style.marginTop = "-2rem"; shellFragment.appendChild(buttonProxy); finalDesc.style.cssText = "text-align: left; width: 72%; height: auto; margin-left: auto; margin-right: auto; display: block;"; finalDesc.innerHTML = ""; finalDesc.appendChild(shellFragment); preloadEndingAssets(); } // hide only the previous slide if (currentSlide) currentSlide.style.display = 'none'; // render slide const slideId = `slide-wrapper-${newPage}`; let nextSlide = document.getElementById(slideId); if (nextSlide) { // if slide exists, just show it nextSlide.style.display = 'block'; } else { // render HTML nextSlide = document.createElement("div"); nextSlide.id = slideId; nextSlide.className = "slide-wrapper"; // inject content nextSlide.innerHTML = `
${campaignTrail_temp.pages[newPage]}
`; narrativeDiv.appendChild(nextSlide); } currentSlide = nextSlide; // update the buttons let btnHtml = ""; const lastPage = campaignTrail_temp.pages.length - 1; if (campaignTrail_temp.pages.length > 1) { if (newPage === 0) { btnHtml = ``; } else if (newPage === lastPage) { btnHtml = ``; } else { btnHtml = ` `; } } buttonProxy.innerHTML = btnHtml; // execute scripts & images campaignTrail_temp.image = false; if (window.endingImageSystem) window.endingImageSystem.reset(); const currentExec = campaignTrail_temp.executable[newPage]; if (currentExec && typeof currentExec === 'function') { try { currentExec(); } catch (e) { console.error(e); } } const candImg = document.querySelector(".person_image"); if (campaignTrail_temp.image) { if (typeof setImage === 'function') setImage(campaignTrail_temp.image); } else if (candImg) { candImg.style.display = 'none'; } window.requestAnimationFrame(() => { if (scrollContainer) scrollContainer.scrollTop = 0; }); }; function setupExpandButton() { const resultsContainer = document.getElementById("results_container") || document.getElementById("game_window"); if (!resultsContainer) return; if (window.getComputedStyle(resultsContainer).position === 'static') { resultsContainer.style.position = 'relative'; } // create the Expand button if (!document.getElementById("expand-ending-btn")) { const expandBtn = document.createElement("button"); expandBtn.id = "expand-ending-btn"; expandBtn.innerText = "Expand"; let modal = document.getElementById("expand-ending-modal"); let contentDiv = document.getElementById("expand-modal-content"); if (!modal) { // create the modal modal = document.createElement("div"); modal.id = "expand-ending-modal"; // close button const closeBtn = document.createElement("button"); closeBtn.id = "expand-modal-close"; closeBtn.innerText = "Close"; closeBtn.onclick = () => modal.style.display = "none"; // content container contentDiv = document.createElement("div"); contentDiv.id = "expand-modal-content"; modal.appendChild(closeBtn); modal.appendChild(contentDiv); document.body.appendChild(modal); } // load current slide's HTML into the modal and show it expandBtn.onclick = () => { contentDiv.innerHTML = campaignTrail_temp.pages[campaignTrail_temp.page] || ""; modal.style.display = "block"; }; resultsContainer.appendChild(expandBtn); } } function attemptRenderEnding() { // if we're in contingent mode, don't attempt to render regular endings if (contingentMode) { return true; } const finalDesc = document.getElementById("final_results_description"); const difficultyTxt = document.getElementById("difficulty_mult"); const overallVote = document.getElementById("overall_vote_statistics"); const mapFooter = document.getElementById("map_footer"); if (finalDesc && difficultyTxt && overallVote && mapFooter) { setupExpandButton(); endingConstructor(0); return true; } //console.log("Ending elements not yet ready."); return false; } // all the endings go here! // main narrative slides (slide 0) // the code will pick the first entry where .condition() returns true const mainEndings = [ { id: "anothertie", condition: (ev) => itsATie, image: "https://i.pinimg.com/1200x/56/d5/4a/56d54ae1f5011841986063b9dc4f214e.jpg", title: "cold blooded old times", html: `
★
cold blooded old times

The phone rang at twenty minutes past two in the morning.

Charlie Brown was asleep on the living room couch, wrapped in a quilt that was half-slipping onto the floor. The shrill, mechanical trill of the landline pierced the heavy silence of the house. He lay there for a long moment, blinking into the dark, waiting for the heavy footsteps of his father or the rustling of his mother upstairs. But the house remained completely still. No one else was going to answer it. Shit.

With a groan that felt like it carried the weight of the entire week, he pushed the quilt aside, shivering as the cold night air hit him. He padded over to the kitchen wall and pulled the receiver from the cradle.

“Hello?” he mumbled, his voice gravelly with sleep.

“Chuck, wake up. It’s me,” Peppermint Patty said. She didn’t sound tired at all; if anything, she sounded entirely wired, practically vibrating through the copper wires. “I just got off the phone with Marcie. T-they spent all night recounting the ballots…”

Charlie squeezed his eyes shut, resting his forehead against the cool plaster of the kitchen wall.

“It’s a tie, Chuck,” Patty announced, with a manic edge of disbelief in her voice. “An actual tie. A right-down-to-the-last-vote tie! Can you believe it!?
